# Disability and Debt -- Relief Options [2026] -- Disabilityanddebt
> Struggling with debt on disability income? SSDI/SSI protections, bankruptcy exemptions, and debt relief options. 2026 guide.

## About
disabilityanddebt.org is part of the Open Bankruptcy Project (openbankruptcyproject.org), a 501(c)(3) nonprofit building free, open-source tools for bankruptcy court transparency.

## Key Pages
- Credit Counseling for People With Disabilities -- Disabilityanddebt: https://disabilityanddebt.org/credit-counseling.html
- Bankruptcy With a Disability -- Disabilityanddebt: https://disabilityanddebt.org/disability-bankruptcy.html
- Disability and Debt -- Relief Options [2026] -- Disabilityanddebt: https://disabilityanddebt.org/
- Judgment Proof Status With a Disability -- Disabilityanddebt: https://disabilityanddebt.org/judgment-proof.html
- The Medical Debt Spiral With Disability -- Disabilityanddebt: https://disabilityanddebt.org/medical-debt-spiral.html
- Protected Income Types -- Disabilityanddebt: https://disabilityanddebt.org/protected-income.html
- SSDI and Garnishment -- Disabilityanddebt: https://disabilityanddebt.org/ssdi-and-garnishment.html
- State Protections for Disabled Debtors -- Disabilityanddebt: https://disabilityanddebt.org/state-protections.html
- Student Loan Discharge for Disabled Borrowers -- Disabilityanddebt: https://disabilityanddebt.org/student-loan-discharge.html
- VA Disability Benefits and Debt -- Disabilityanddebt: https://disabilityanddebt.org/va-disability.html
- Seniors and Bankruptcy -- A Guide for Older Americans Filing Bankruptcy: https://disabilityanddebt.org/seniors-bankruptcy.html
- Veterans and Bankruptcy -- Military-Specific Protections and Benefits: https://disabilityanddebt.org/veterans-bankruptcy.html

## Contact
- Website: https://openbankruptcyproject.org
- Email: contact@openbankruptcyproject.org
- GitHub: https://github.com/openbankruptcyproject

## License
Content is provided for educational purposes. Data sourced from the Federal Judicial Center Integrated Database (4.9M cases, 94 districts).
